description_long: This is a single-story wooden bungalow with a dark brown gabled roof and a stone foundation, set on a rectangular grassy plot bordered by a low fence. The front features a covered porch with wooden posts and steps leading up to the main entrance, while the rear includes a smaller secondary porch. Large windows line the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The roof has multiple intersecting gables, adding architectural interest and providing additional shelter over the porch areas. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving the house a rustic yet refined appearance. The surrounding yard is landscaped with a paved walkway leading from the front gate to the entrance.
description: A single-story wooden bungalow with a dark gabled roof, stone foundation, and covered front porch, set on a grassy fenced plot with large windows and intersecting rooflines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and intersecting gabled roof.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the front porch, main entrance, and the paved walkway leading to the house.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the secondary porch, side windows, and the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear porch, extended roofline, and the full length of the fenced property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
